<!-- tbm-handoff -->

**Optional aid.** Use only when work changes hands mid-PR or a PR is paused with a clear next action. One active comment per PR marker — edit in place, do not append a new comment.

**Role:** <!-- builder | auditor | lt | sonnet-visual -->

**Status:** <!-- in-progress | paused | handing-off | blocked -->

**Scope:** <!-- one sentence naming the named PR/current state this handoff is about; nothing else -->

**Next Action:** <!-- the single next step the incoming owner should take; include file paths or command lines if useful -->

**Notes:** <!-- optional one-liner for context; do not restate findings that already live inline in PR review comments -->
